title: IT Sales Manager - WCAN
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Lead the full sales cycle for digital and IT services, from generating leads to closing deals.
  • Actively engage in public and private RFPs, tenders, and government procurement platforms (such as GeBIZ).
  • Prepare customized proposals, quotations, technical documents, and presentation materials.
  • Act as the technical advisor throughout the sales process, translating client needs into effective and scalable solutions.
  • Showcase product features through demonstrations, prototypes, and walkthroughs.
  • Collaborate with project teams to accurately scope solutions and align expectations with deliverables.
  • Ensure client satisfaction by managing upselling, renewals, and handling escalations professionally.
  • Monitor and manage sales pipelines, providing regular updates on key metrics and achievements.
  • Build and maintain strong client relationships based on trust, transparency, and reliable delivery.
  • Evaluate and communicate the technical feasibility and architecture of proposed solutions, such as CMS platforms, custom applications, and experiential technologies.
  • Act as a bridge between sales and development teams to ensure solutions are technically viable and properly scoped.
  • Coordinate with vendors and internal technical teams to gather requirements, define system specifications, and ensure seamless integration.


Qualifications:

  • Degree or diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, Digital Media, or related disciplines.
  • 1 to 3 years of combined experience in IT sales and/or pre-sales/solution consulting.
  • Proven experience managing IT tenders and digital transformation projects, particularly within Singapore.
  • Skilled at translating technical concepts into clear business value for non-technical audiences.
  • Detail-oriented with a professional attitude and strong commitment to client success.


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
